description: Zoom provides video meetings, chat, phone, rooms, webinars, and related workplace and business communication services. Its platform also offers developer APIs and app integrations for accessing Zoom account, user, and meeting data.
summary: Zoom exposes an OAuth-protected REST API at `api.zoom.us/v2`, a beta GraphQL API at `api.zoom.us/v3/graphql`, a Zoom Rooms SSH-based control CLI/API on per-room hosts and port `2244`, and MCP documentation without a published connect endpoint.
